recommendations.description: Merge 9 duplicate rules checking same fields (all check VaultARN/Policy existence instead of actual configuration)
Fix rules checking wrong fields (many check VaultARN/Policy existence instead of actual configuration)
recommendations.impact: HIGH - Ensures rules validate correct compliance requirements

cross_service_analysis.note: Note: All methods used are glacier service methods
cross_service_analysis.explanation: All python_methods (get_data_retrieval_policy, describe_vault, get_vault_access_policy, get_vault_lock) belong to glacier service. No cross-service issues found.
cross_service_analysis.recommendation: No action needed - rules correctly use glacier API methods
